validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalidTime: Time must be in HH:MM format.
validation.invalidDayOfWeek: Day of week must be an integer from 0 to 6.
validation.invalidNonNegative: Value must be a non-negative number.
validation.invalidWeeklyStartDay: Weekly report start day must be between 0 and 6.

profileSettings.cardDescription: Update your public-facing business identity, logo, and how customers discover you.

logo.sectionDescription: Shown in discovery, receipts, and other customer-facing surfaces.
logo.hintCurrentCloud: Current logo comes from the last saved cloud image URL.
logo.hintDefault: Hover or tap the logo area and upload an image file.

core.sectionDescription: Legal and contact details used for billing, support, and account records.

discovery.sectionDescription: Help customers find you when browsing or searching.

section.title: Advanced table integration target
section.description: First production wiring will use this section as the integration boundary.

states.emptySubMessage: Try changing filters or check back later.

config.saveDisabled: Save is disabled when configuration is unavailable.
config.validationVisibleColumn: At least one enabled and visible column is required.

addressMap.geoNotFound: Could not find that address on the map.
addressMap.geoFailed: Geocoding request failed. Try again later.
addressMap.shortQueryHint: Add a bit more address detail to locate on the map.
addressMap.footerNotice: Map data © OpenStreetMap contributors. Geocoding uses the public Nominatim service—use sparingly in production or host your own instance.

addressSettings.cardDescription: Postal and location details used on records and discovery.
addressSettings.sectionDescription: Postal and location details used on records and delivery orders.

credentialsSettings.cardDescription: Update sign-in email and password. You may need to sign in again after saving.
credentialsSettings.sectionDescription: Emails use the same format rules as elsewhere. Match both email fields. For a new password, match both password fields and enter your current password. Leave new password blank to keep the existing one.
credentialsSettings.columnHintEmail: The business sign-in email is filled from your profile. Change it here if needed; both boxes must match.
credentialsSettings.columnHintPassword: Optional new password. Leave both blank to keep your current password; if you set one, both must match.

validation.currentPasswordRequired: Enter your current password to set a new sign-in password.
